summary: Iteration 75 - Full validation of Photographer-to-Surfer workflow: Map drawer, header stability, Photo Tools menu, SpotConditions data. All 7 features tested PASS on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812) viewports.

minor.issue: 404 errors - missing booking data or endpoint issue (non-blocking)
Failed to fetch stats - AxiosError (non-blocking for UI)

validation_path_1_map_spot_drawer.details: Map Spot Click -> Drawer Opens -> Report Shows -> Photographer List Shows. Drawer opens with vaul library, shows spot name, 'Start Shooting' button, surf conditions, tide data, and 'Live Now' section.

validation_path_3_photo_tools_drawer_mob.details: Full 5-item menu accessible and scrollable: 1) On-Demand toggle, 2) Live Sessions, 3) My Gallery, 4) Bookings, 5) Earnings, 6) On-Demand Settings (PRO badge). Scroll: 724px height, 570px viewport = scrollable.

desktop_sidebar_on_map.details: Sidebar visible on Map page with z-index=100, position=fixed, width=200px at x=0

mobile_header_stability.details: Mobile header (6-7 icons) remains stationary when drawer opens. Header: top=0, height=51px before and after drawer open.

drawer_content_scrollable.details: Drawer content scrollable on both desktop and mobile. Photo Tools drawer: scrollHeight=724, clientHeight=570 (scrollable). UnifiedSpotDrawer uses vaul library with overflow-y-auto.

spot_conditions_real_data.details: SpotConditions component showing REAL data from Open-Meteo Marine API and NOAA Tides: Wave Height 7.3ft, Swell 1.4ft, Tide data (High 10:00 AM 2.1ft, High 10:31 PM 2.3ft)

on_demand_settings_accessible.details: On-Demand Settings accessible for Photographer role via both Desktop sidebar (Photo Tools menu) and Mobile Photo Tools drawer. Page shows: Your Location, Claim Spots, Dynamic Pricing ($75/hr), On-Demand Profile, Save Settings.

critical_code_review_comments: PhotoToolsDrawer.js line 49: canUseOnDemand correctly includes 'Photographer' role - confirmed working
Sidebar.js line 171: z-[100] correctly applied for Map page overlay - sidebar visible
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js uses vaul drawer component for proper mobile scrolling - working correctly
MapPage.js line 1015: md:left-[200px] offset correctly applied for desktop sidebar
SpotConditions.js: Real data fetched from /api/conditions/{spotId} and /api/tides/{spotId}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 requested features verified PASS. Desktop sidebar (z-100), mobile header stability, Photo Tools drawer with 6 menu items (including On-Demand Settings), SpotConditions with real wave/tide data, drawer scrollability all working correctly. Map takes 8-10 seconds to load as noted. Non-blocking 404 errors on /api/bookings/* endpoints.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all features working as intended. The vaul drawer library is correctly used for mobile scroll handling. Sidebar z-index=100 ensures visibility on Map page above the map container (z-50).
